name: jobsafe-mobile-poc
description: JobSafe QA: Playwright (mobile web) + MobileWright (native APK/IPA)

scripts.native:test:sample: npm run native:fetch-sample && mobilewright test -c mobilewright.config.ts --project sample-android --reporter=list
scripts.native:test:sample:full: npm run native:fetch-sample && set NATIVE_FULL=1&& mobilewright test -c mobilewright.config.ts --project sample-android --reporter=list
scripts.native:test:sample:full:extended: npm run native:fetch-sample && set NATIVE_FULL=1&& set NATIVE_EXTENDED=1&& mobilewright test -c mobilewright.config.ts --project sample-android --reporter=list
scripts.native:test:sample:watch: npm run native:fetch-sample && set NATIVE_DEMO=1&& set NATIVE_FULL=1&& mobilewright test -c mobilewright.config.ts --project sample-android --reporter=list
scripts.test:all: npm run test:web && npm run native:test:sample
